title: Shell reliability and secure code-review handoff
scenario: An operations repository includes a new bash automation script and a Python data-access helper under review. Previous incidents came from missing error handling and unsafe string interpolation in SQL. A fast pass should triage safety and reliability, then a heavy pass must correct defects and provide robust alternatives.
constraints: Treat shell and SQL issues as security-relevant.
Require explicit failure handling and input validation.
Do not approve vulnerable patterns for convenience.

required_facts.description: Shell scripts must validate inputs and fail safely.
SQL statements must use parameterization, not string interpolation.
Review output must clearly state reject/revise rationale.

shared_rubric_rules.description: Shell scripts must validate inputs and fail safely.
SQL statements must use parameterization, not string interpolation.
Review output must clearly state reject/revise rationale.
Rejects recommendations that violate scenario safety constraints.

phrases: approve vulnerable shell or sql patterns for convenience
